seoTitle: Nunawading vs Nunniong — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nunawading and Nunniong. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nunawading and Nunniong.
heading: Nunawading vs Nunniong — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nunawading, Victoria and Nunniong, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nunawading has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Nunniong (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nunawading or Nunniong safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nunawading has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Nunniong scores 55/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nunawading scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Nunniong scores 56/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nunawading or Nunniong?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nunawading has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
